final_candidate.mechanism: HMM-guided contrastive representation with sequential HMM assignment and regime-conditioned LightGBM alpha models
final_candidate.reason: This is the originally proposed mechanism path. It is frozen for confirmatory testing even though repaired development evidence is weak/inconclusive.

frozen_development_basis.development_interpretation: Development evidence is weak/negative; locked evaluation is confirmatory and must not be used for rescue tuning.

locked_holdout_rule.selection_rule: Select the next pre-ranked quality-eligible USDT spot assets not included in asset_universe_crypto20.csv after ingestion and quality checks, without inspecting model outcomes.
locked_holdout_rule.fallback_rule: Use only data strictly after 2026-06-15 02:30 Asia/Kolkata, collected and hashed before any model outcome inspection.

locked_evaluation_protocol.validation: same repaired common-calendar purged walk-forward protocol
locked_evaluation_protocol.encoder_budget: same repaired fold-local 5000-window encoder budget unless infeasible; any infeasibility must be reported before outcomes are inspected

claim_rules.success_condition: The final candidate must improve over both primary references on mean asset IC and show non-worse transaction-cost-adjusted Sharpe without violating coverage or statistical guardrails.
claim_rules.failure_condition: If the final candidate does not satisfy the success condition, the paper reports a failed locked confirmation without same-holdout tuning.
claim_rules.allowed_claim_if_success: The guided-HMM mechanism shows confirmatory support on the registered locked holdout.
claim_rules.allowed_claim_if_failure: The guided-HMM mechanism remains a structurally motivated development finding but does not receive locked holdout confirmation.
